2026/05/22 16:49:56.274560316 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274560736 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274574467 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274577091 if (!missing(bg))

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274592194 if (!missing(fg))

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274607076 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274620927 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274621989 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274710011 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274721479 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274730913 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274731404 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274750963 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274801334 "default"))
2026/05/22 16:49:56.274816967 old$encoding <- enc

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274831770 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/22 16:49:56.274882696 }
